login.title: Login to your account
Bysigningupyouagreetoour.text: By signing up, you agree to our
dontworry.text: Don’t worry, we’ll send you reset instructions.
wesentpassword.text: We sent a password reset link to your email.
didntreceiveemail.text: Didn’t receive an email from us yet?
livestream.nostreams: No LIVE streams for you yet
livestream.gobacktoexplore: Go back to explore more videos
livestream.topic_content: Topics will help your LIVE videos reach more viewers and the viewers can use topics to find your LIVE videos, more easily.
livestream.goal_expire: The goal will expire in 4 hours.
livestream.help_achieve_goal: Help me achieve my first goal and I’ll sing a song
livestream.your_recommended_coin_amount_: Your recommended Coin amount per Gift:
livestream.likely_reach_goal: Likely you’ll reach this goal. Go for it!
livestream.add_this_live_goal_for_future: Add this LIVE goal to all your future LIVE videos. You can change it anytime.
livestream.these_settings_apply_to_all_v: These settings apply to all LIVE videos.
livestream.intro_description: Show an intro of yourself and your community
livestream.intro_prompt: Add an 'Intro to tell your viewers what your LIVE is about. Viewers will see this when they join your LIVE.
livestream.edit_after_publish_question: Can I edit it once published?
livestream.edit_after_publish_answer: Yes, feel free to edit it. Once passed Seezitt's safety review, the latest version will automatically replace the previous one.
livestream.spam_comments_description: These comments are disruptive or repetitive.
livestream.unkind_comments_description: These comments are suggestive, mean-spirited, or stereotyping towards another group.
livestream.community_flagged_comments_de: These comments are similar to those our community has previously flagged, but don't violate our Community Guidelines.
livestream.review_community_flagged_comm: Turn this on to let creators and moderators approve community-flagged comments during LIVE.
livestream.live_goal_description: LIVE goals can help you become more popular.
livestream.live_goal_gift_info: YmJ can set a LIVE goal with up to 3 Gifts. Viewers can send the Gifts during your LIVE streams to achieve the goal with you. When you achieve a goal, there will be a special effect to celebrate.
livestream.live_goal_gift_options: Setting Gifts of different Coin amounts is a great way to provide options for your viewers to show appreciation to your LIVE.
livestream.live_goal_description_tip: A brief and clear description can attract more viewers.
livestream.example_sing_song: Help me achieve my first goal and I’ll sing a song.
livestream.example_extra_minutes: I’ll go LIVE for extra minutes if I achieve my first goal.
livestream.be_relevant_tip: Having a LIVE goal relevant to the theme of your LIVE might motivate your viewers more.
livestream.example_dancing: I am at dancing. I will dance disco if I make it.
livestream.example_gym: I love gym workout. I’ll do 20 sit-ups if I achieve the goal.
livestream.be_attainable_tip: A LIVE goal will expire in 4 hours, so make sure your LIVE goal is attainable and not too challenging in the time limit.
livestream.blocked_keywords_info: We’ll block LIVE comments with words, phrases, and emoji you add as keywords.
livestream.add_word_phrase_emoji: Add a word, phrase, or emoji
livestream.keyword_limit: Keywords can be up to 30 characters
livestream.block_similar_versions_descri: We’ll block comments with similar versions of this keyword. For example, bad blocks badness and badnesss.
livestream.muted_account_description: These accounts are muted for the rest of the LIVE
livestream.edit_muted_list_tip: Edit this list by tapping 'Manage' on a viewer's personal card
livestream.blocked_account_description: These accounts are Blocked for the rest of the LIVE
livestream.mute_rules_description: Add rules to mute viewers who comment specific words, phrases, and emojis.
livestream.auto_mute_description: Automatically mute viewers who comment specific words, phrases, or emojis.
livestream.mute_unwanted_comments: Mute viewers who comment unwanted words,phrases, and emoji.
livestream.mute_rule_instruction: Add a word, phrase, or emoji and set a mute duration.
livestream.exact_match_rule_description: Viewers who comment or have previously commented the exact word will be muted.
livestream.example_boring_rule: Example: Adding 'Boring' will only mute viewers who comment 'Boring', not 'You are boring' or 'Boringggg.'
livestream.exact_match_only: We'll only mute viewers who comment the exact phrase without additional letters or words.
livestream.mute_summary: This will mute 0 viewers who commented
livestream.mute_rest_of_live: and anyone who comments it for the rest of the LIVE
livestream.welcome_message: Welcome to my LIVE! Leave a comment to interact with me and other viewers. Follow my account if you enjoy today's video!
livestream.community_flagged_info: Community-flagged comments will be visible to you during the LIVE.
livestream.top_viewer_rules: Top viewers are ranked based on likes, comments, gift count, and watch time. Viewers who send more likes, comments, and gifts will rank higher. Points are calculated by the following rules: 1 like = 1 point (max- 3 points every 10 mins) 1 comment = 1 point (max. 3 points every 10 mins) 1 Coin = 1 point Viewers with no points will be ranked based on how long they have been watching the LIVE. Viewers who are underage in their respective country or region are unable to view top viewer rankings.
livestream.coin_check_info: Viewers can check the number of Coins they used to send Gifts in this LIVE if they are in the top 99. However, some top viewers' activity information may be concealed depending on their ranking position.
livestream.top_2_benefit: If viewers become the top 2 by sending Gifts, they'll get the chance to have their profile photos shown to everyone at the top of the LIVE.
livestream.what_get_as_top_viewer: 2. What can I get if I become a top viewer?
livestream.profile_photo_reward: The top 2 viewers profile photos will be shown to everyone at the top of the LIVE.
livestream.badge_conditions: have the chance to get a top viewer badge if the value of the Gifts they send is in the top 3. The top viewer badges will be displayed next to their usernames in the comments, their profiles, and the Top Viewer Ranking. The top 3 viewers' ranking position will also be notified in the comments.
livestream.rank_display: will be displayed in the Top Viewer Ranking. View the ranking by tapping the number at the top of a LIVE.
livestream.can_hide_ranking: 3. Can I choose not to be shown in the rankings?
livestream.ranking_visibility_change: Yes, If you choose not to be shown in the rankings, go to [Share] > [Settings] > [Rankings] to change your visibility settings.
livestream.welcome_guidelines: 💲 Welcome to Seezitt LIVE! Have fun interacting with others in real time. Creators must be 18 or older to go LIVE. Viewers must be 18 or older to recharge and send Gifts. Remember to follow our Community Guidelines.
livestream.send_gifts_support: 💗 Send Gifts to support and help desiLiv***
livestream.emergency_notice: If you know someone that is in immediate physical danger, contact local law enforcement right away.
livestream.how_top_viewer_ranked: Top viewers are ranked based on Gifts count and watch time. Viewers who send Gifts that are worth more Coins will rank higher. Viewers with no Gift counts will be ranked based on how long they have been watching the LIVE.
livestream.what_if_top_viewer: What can I get if I am a top viewer?
livestream.top_2_benefit_2: The top 2 viewers will have their profile photos shown on the top right corner of the LIVE. Ranking list will show the top 99 viewers.
livestream.hide_ranking_option: What if I do not wish to be seen as a top viewer on the ranking list?
livestream.ranking_visibility_setting: Top viewers can choose not to show their info on the list. You can change your visibility setting in “Ranking settings”.
livestream.request_to_join: Request to join as a guest
livestream.chance_to_be_guest: Grab your chance to be the next guest!
livestream.seezitt_rewards: Seezitt rewards both you and the creator for your popularity during this LIVE
livestream.invite_to_live: invites you to GO LIVE Together
livestream.live_public_notice: LIVE videos are public. Your followers may be notified and a recording of the LIVE video will be available to the host.
livestream.turn_off_invites: Turn off invitations for this LIVE video
livestream.name: Name
livestream.ranking_description: Show your username, gifting, and watching info in Top Viewers list
livestream.how_blocked_keywords_live_com: We'll block LIVE comments with words, phrases, and emoji you add as keywords.
livestream.upper_and_lower_case_keywords: You don't need to add upper and lower case keywords. For example, bad blocks BAD and BAD.
livestream.spaces_inside_keywords_descri: You don't need to add spaces inside of keywords. For example, bad blocks Bad chat and bad chat.
livestream.special_characters_descriptio: You don't need to add keywords with special characters. For example, bad blocks b@d.
livestream.default_settings_faqs_2: We'll block similar versions of a keyword. For example, bad blocks badness and badnesss.
livestream.default_settings_faqs_4: We'll only block a keyword if it has spaces on both sides.
livestream.default_settings_faqs_5: For example, bad blocks a bad chat, but not abadchat.
livestream.use_headphones_to_hear: Use headphones to hear how you sound to viewers
livestream.gift_changes_fewer_coins: Change 🐦 ❤ to Gifts with fewer Coins to make your goal easier
